info.title: Reachy Mini REST API
info.description: HTTP and WebSocket API exposed by the Reachy Mini daemon. Interactive Swagger docs are available at `/docs` when the daemon is running.

get.description: List available apps (including not installed).

schema.title: Response List Available Apps Api Apps List Available  Source Kind  Get

get.description: List all available apps (including not installed).

schema.title: Response List All Available Apps Api Apps List Available Get

post.description: Install a new app by its info (background, returns job_id).

schema.title: Response Install App Api Apps Install Post

post.description: Remove an installed app by its name (background, returns job_id).

schema.title: App Name
Response Remove App Api Apps Remove  App Name  Post

get.description: Get status/logs for a job.

schema.title: Job Id

post.description: Start an app by its name.

schema.title: App Name

post.description: Restart the currently running app.
Stop the currently running app.

get.description: Get the status of the currently running app, if any.

schema.title: Response Current App Status Api Apps Current App Status Get

post.description:
Install a private HuggingFace space.

Requires HF token to be stored via /api/hf-auth/save-token first.

schema.title: Response Install Private Space Api Apps Install Private Space Post

get.description:
Check all installed apps for available updates.

Results are cached for 5 minutes unless force=True.
This performs a 'slow' check with rate limiting to avoid overwhelming HuggingFace.

schema.title: Force

post.description:
Update an installed app to the latest version.

This reinstalls the app from HuggingFace, which downloads the latest version.
Returns a job_id for tracking progress via WebSocket.

schema.title: App Name
Response Update App Api Apps Update  App Name  Post

get.description:
Get the detected camera specifications.

Returns the camera name, available resolutions, default resolution,
intrinsic matrix (K) and distortion coefficients (D) for the camera
that the daemon detected at startup.

post.description: Start the daemon.

schema.title: Wake Up
Response Start Daemon Api Daemon Start Post

post.description: Stop the daemon, optionally putting the robot to sleep.

schema.title: Goto Sleep
Response Stop Daemon Api Daemon Stop Post

post.description: Restart the daemon.

schema.title: Response Restart Daemon Api Daemon Restart Post

get.description: Get the current status of the daemon.

post.description: Save HuggingFace token after validation.

get.description: Check if user is authenticated with HuggingFace.

schema.title: Response Get Auth Status Api Hf Auth Status Get

get.description: Get the central signaling relay connection status.

schema.title: Response Get Relay Status Api Hf Auth Relay Status Get
Response Delete Token Api Hf Auth Token Delete

get.description: Check if OAuth is configured.

schema.title: Response Is Oauth Configured Api Hf Auth Oauth Configured Get

get.description:
Start a new OAuth authorization session.

Returns the auth_url to redirect the user to HuggingFace.

schema.title: Response Start Oauth Api Hf Auth Oauth Start Get

get.description:
Poll for OAuth session status.

The frontend polls this endpoint to check if the user has
completed authorization.

schema.title: Session Id
Response Get Oauth Status Api Hf Auth Oauth Status  Session Id  Get
Session Id
Response Cancel Oauth Session Api Hf Auth Oauth Session  Session Id  Delete

get.description:
Handle OAuth callback from HuggingFace.

This is where HF redirects after user authorizes.
Shows a success/error page that the user can close.

schema.title: Code
State
Error
Error Description

get.description: Get the current information of the kinematics.

schema.title: Response Get Kinematics Info Api Kinematics Info Get

get.description: Get the URDF representation of the robot.

schema.title: Response Get Urdf Api Kinematics Urdf Get

get.description: Get the path to an STL asset file.

schema.title: Filename

post.description: Release camera and audio hardware for direct client access.

schema.title: Response Release Media Api Media Release Post

post.description: Re-acquire camera and audio hardware.

schema.title: Response Acquire Media Api Media Acquire Post

get.description: Get the current media status.

schema.title: Response Media Status Api Media Status Get

post.description:
Play a sound file on the robot's speaker.

The *file* field can be:
- An absolute path on the daemon's filesystem.
- A filename relative to the built-in assets directory.
- A filename previously uploaded to the sounds temp directory.

schema.title: Response Play Sound Api Media Play Sound Post

post.description: Stop the currently playing sound file.

schema.title: Response Stop Sound Api Media Stop Sound Post

post.description:
Upload a sound file to the daemon's temporary sound directory.

The file is saved to ``/tmp/reachy_mini_sounds/<original_filename>``.
If a file with the same name already exists it is overwritten.

Returns:
    JSON with the absolute *path* of the saved file on the daemon.

schema.title: Response Upload Sound Api Media Sounds Upload Post

get.description: List sound files in the daemon's temporary sound directory.

schema.title: Response List Sounds Api Media Sounds Get

delete.description:
Delete a sound file from the daemon's temporary sound directory.

Only files inside the temp directory can be deleted (no path traversal).

schema.title: Filename
Response Delete Sound Api Media Sounds  Filename  Delete

get.description: Get the current status of the motors.

post.description: Set the motor control mode.

schema.title: Response Set Motor Mode Api Motors Set Mode  Mode  Post

get.description: Get a list of currently running move tasks.

schema.title: Response Get Running Moves Api Move Running Get

post.description: Request a movement to a specific target.
Request the robot to wake up.
Request the robot to go to sleep.

get.description: List available recorded moves in a dataset.

schema.title: Dataset Name
Response List Recorded Move Dataset Api Move Recorded Move Datasets List  Dataset Name  Get

post.description: Request the robot to play a predefined recorded move from a dataset.

schema.title: Dataset Name
Move Name

post.description: Stop a running move task.

schema.title: Response Stop Move Api Move Stop Post

post.description: POST route to set a single FullBodyTarget.

schema.title: Response Set Target Api Move Set Target Post

get.description:
Get the present head pose.

Arguments:
    use_pose_matrix (bool): Whether to use the pose matrix representation (4x4 flattened) or the translation + Euler angles representation (x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw).
    backend (Backend): The backend instance.

Returns:
    AnyPose: The present head pose.

schema.title: Use Pose Matrix
Response Get Head Pose Api State Present Head Pose Get

get.description: Get the present body yaw (in radians).

schema.title: Response Get Body Yaw Api State Present Body Yaw Get

get.description: Get the present antenna joint positions (in radians) - (left, right).

schema.title: Response Get Antenna Joint Positions Api State Present Antenna Joint Positions Get

get.description:
Get the Direction of Arrival from the microphone array.

Returns the angle in radians (0=left, π/2=front, π=right) and speech detection status.
Returns None if the audio device is not available.

schema.title: Response Get Doa Api State Doa Get

get.description: Get the full robot state, with optional fields.

schema.title: With Control Mode
With Head Pose
With Target Head Pose
With Head Joints
With Target Head Joints
With Body Yaw
With Target Body Yaw
With Antenna Positions
With Target Antenna Positions
With Passive Joints
With Doa
Use Pose Matrix

get.description: Get the current output volume level.

post.description: Set the output volume level and play a test sound.
Play a test sound.

get.description: Get the current microphone input volume level.

post.description: Set the microphone input volume level.

get.description: Render the dashboard.

AppUpdateStatus.title: AppUpdateStatus
AppUpdateStatus.description: Status of an app update check.

AppUpdatesResponse.title: AppUpdatesResponse
AppUpdatesResponse.description: Response for list of app updates.

CameraSpecsResponse.title: CameraSpecsResponse
CameraSpecsResponse.description: Full camera specifications as detected by the daemon.

DaemonState.title: DaemonState
DaemonState.description: Enum representing the state of the Reachy Mini daemon.

DaemonStatus.title: DaemonStatus
DaemonStatus.description: Status of the Reachy Mini daemon.

DoAInfo.title: DoAInfo
DoAInfo.description: Direction of Arrival info from the microphone array.

FullBodyTarget.title: FullBodyTarget
FullBodyTarget.description: Represent the full body including the head pose and the joints for antennas.

FullState.title: FullState
FullState.description: Represent the full state of the robot including all joint positions and poses.

GotoModelRequest.title: GotoModelRequest
GotoModelRequest.description: Request model for the goto endpoint.

JobInfo.title: JobInfo
JobInfo.description: Pydantic model for install job status.

Matrix4x4Pose.title: Matrix4x4Pose
Matrix4x4Pose.description: Represent a 3D pose by its 4x4 transformation matrix (translation is expressed in meters).

MotorStatus.title: MotorStatus
MotorStatus.description:
Represents the status of the motors.

Exposes
- mode: The current motor control mode (enabled, disabled, gravity_compensation).

MoveUUID.title: MoveUUID
MoveUUID.description: Model representing a unique identifier for a move task.

PlaySoundRequest.title: PlaySoundRequest
PlaySoundRequest.description: Request body for the play_sound endpoint.

PrivateSpaceInstallRequest.title: PrivateSpaceInstallRequest
PrivateSpaceInstallRequest.description: Request model for installing a private HuggingFace space.

TestSoundResponse.title: TestSoundResponse
TestSoundResponse.description: Response model for test sound operations.

TokenRequest.title: TokenRequest
TokenRequest.description: Request model for saving a HuggingFace token.

XYZRPYPose.title: XYZRPYPose
XYZRPYPose.description: Represent a 3D pose using position (x, y, z) in meters and orientation (roll, pitch, yaw) angles in radians.
